category_competition_os.mission: Every bot must be able to build a revolutionary app for the DreamCo app store that can compete with, learn from, and aim to beat the top apps in its category through better workflows, safer automation, stronger sandbox tests, and clearer client value.

packet_template.api_sandbox_proof: Every API has schema, mock auth, rate, retry, negative, abuse, approval, rollback, and audit tests.
packet_template.category_leader_map: Top apps, substitutes, pricing, onboarding, reviews, strengths, weaknesses, and trust signals.
packet_template.codex_final_judge_packet: Codex reviews evidence, quality, source fit, and launch boundaries before the owner approves advertising or launch.
packet_template.feature_gap_matrix: Must-match features, must-beat features, missing opportunities, and risk notes.
packet_template.revolutionary_app_concept: One app-store-ready concept with workflows, APIs, webhooks, dashboard, storage, support, and proof.

deployment_targets.label: GitHub Pages
deployment_targets.role: Free static previews for dashboards, websites, courses, simple games, and static simulations.

deployment_targets.label: Hostinger
deployment_targets.role: Starter public hosting target for Buddy dashboard builds and client demos.

deployment_targets.label: Local laptop
deployment_targets.role: Development, demos, sandbox runs, and owner-supervised builds before public deployment.

deployment_targets.label: Static host
deployment_targets.role: Portable static deploy bundle for CDN-style hosts.

deployment_targets.label: Managed Node host
deployment_targets.role: Node or API-backed apps after secrets, auth, observability, and rollback gates are configured.

deployment_targets.label: Container host
deployment_targets.role: Full-stack apps, bot services, schedulers, and API workers that need a runtime beyond static hosting.

gaps: Managed Node and container hosting adapters are planned and need production credentials before live backend apps.
Payment, email, and revenue notifications still need live Stripe and notification configuration before client billing.

lanes.description: Prompt-to-playable prototypes with game design docs, levels, scoring, controls, saves, and test scenes.
lanes.label: Games
lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: gameplay loop, controls, collision, scoring, save-state, level progression, and accessibility checks

lanes.description: Client-ready websites, landing pages, portals, documentation hubs, and product showcases.
lanes.label: Websites
lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: responsive layout, forms, accessibility, SEO metadata, link integrity, and static deployment checks

lanes.description: Full app builds with screens, local-first data, auth adapters, API adapters, tests, and rollback notes.
lanes.label: Apps
lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: auth mocks, CRUD flows, error states, API contracts, migration rehearsal, and rollback simulation

lanes.description: Age-appropriate course generators for lessons, quizzes, assignments, rubrics, teacher notes, and student-safe media plans.
lanes.label: School courses
lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: learning objectives, grade fit, quiz validation, source notes, accessibility, and content safety checks

lanes.description: Business, science, finance, operations, robotics, real estate, and training simulations with adjustable variables.
lanes.label: Simulations
lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: determinism, bounds, sensitivity checks, invalid input handling, replay logs, and explainable outputs

lanes.description: Operational command centers, prospectus pages, bot dashboards, KPI trackers, and client demo rooms.
lanes.label: Dashboards
lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: empty states, stale data flags, loading failures, report contract tests, and role-safe views

lanes.description: Music video packets, image editing workflows, brand kits, storyboards, audio plans, and asset-rights ledgers.
lanes.label: Creative media
lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: rights review, consent proof, prompt provenance, caption checks, and no deceptive likeness use

lanes.description: Client business workers for sales, support, booking, estimating, CRM updates, lead capture, and delivery workflows.
lanes.label: Business bots
lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: tool permissions, API mocks, webhook replay, client data redaction, revenue-risk checks, and rollback drill

mission: Make DreamCo the in-house A-to-Z foundry for building, testing, packaging, hosting, and deploying games, websites, apps, school courses, simulations, dashboards, creative media, and business bot systems.
next_build_targets: Create one prompt-to-preview wizard for all eight lanes.
Add deployment manifests per lane with static, Node, and container modes.
Add rollback/checkpoint records for generated app builds.
Add client prospectus pages that explain what each built artifact does, costs, risks, and test proof.
Add per-lane eval loops that rerun after every generated change.
Add category leader comparison pages for each bot app before public launch.
Add best-quality API sandbox proof cards for every generated API.
ownership_rule: DreamCo-owned repository code is the source of truth. External clouds, static hosts, payment processors, email providers, and domain services are deployment targets or adapters, not the builder of record.
static_preview_rules: Every lane must produce a previewable artifact before any live deployment.
GitHub Pages can host static dashboards, courses, docs, games, websites, and simple simulations.
Apps that require backend secrets must use static mock mode until a governed API host is connected.
